goal: Move the scoring-engine implementation behind the transfer_surface namespace while preserving the top-level scoring_engine module path through a compatibility alias.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Do not expand the transfer namespace API surface in this tranche
behavioral_changes: The real scoring-engine implementation now lives under chip_labs.transfer_surface.
The old top-level scoring_engine module now acts as a compatibility alias.
The scoring-engine public API remains unchanged.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.scoring_engine import MutationScoringEngine, ScoringConfigBuilder, from_manifest; from chip_labs.transfer_surface.scoring_engine import MutationScoringEngine as moved_MutationScoringEngine; import chip_labs.cli; print('scoring-engine-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: loop_controller.py is the remaining transfer-surface implementation anchor still at the top level.
Keep the top-level scoring_engine alias until the transfer surface is fully settled.
